summary: Planned non-mutating inventory classifications for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an independent live PR inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, fix, or security-route action is recommended from the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Standalone useful contributor PR; keep open for maintainer/author follow-up rather than close or merge in this plan-only inventory job.
Standalone feature/config PR with a failing proof check; keep open for maintainer review rather than close or merge.
Standalone focused bug-fix PR with useful code and a failing CI lane; keep open for maintainer review.
Standalone focused contributor PR; keep open for maintainer review because this inventory job cannot merge and the linked issue is not a hydrated close target.
Standalone focused contributor PR with useful code; keep open for maintainer review because this plan-only inventory job cannot merge.
